model.cp.sei_stg_positions.name: sei_stg_positions
model.cp.sei_stg_positions.compiled_code:
SELECT positions_id,
       account_id,
       as_of_date,
       ABS(amount) AS amount,
       quantity,
       UPPER(currency) AS currency,
       TRIM(client_name) AS client_name
FROM sei_stage.sei_brz_positions
WHERE amount IS NOT NULL
model.cp.sei_stg_positions.raw_code:
SELECT positions_id,
       account_id,
       as_of_date,
       ABS(amount) AS amount,
       quantity,
       UPPER(currency) AS currency,
       TRIM(client_name) AS client_name
FROM sei_stage.sei_brz_positions
WHERE amount IS NOT NULL

model.cp.sei_int_positions_enriched.name: sei_int_positions_enriched
model.cp.sei_int_positions_enriched.compiled_code:
SELECT s.positions_id,
       s.account_id,
       s.as_of_date,
       s.amount,
       s.amount * fx.rate AS amount_usd,
       s.quantity,
       s.currency
FROM pbdw.sei_stg_positions s
LEFT JOIN pbdw.int_fx_rates fx ON fx.currency = s.currency AND fx.as_of_date = s.as_of_date
model.cp.sei_int_positions_enriched.raw_code:
SELECT s.positions_id,
       s.account_id,
       s.as_of_date,
       s.amount,
       s.amount * fx.rate AS amount_usd,
       s.quantity,
       s.currency
FROM pbdw.sei_stg_positions s
LEFT JOIN pbdw.int_fx_rates fx ON fx.currency = s.currency AND fx.as_of_date = s.as_of_date

model.cp.int_fx_rates.name: int_fx_rates
model.cp.int_fx_rates.compiled_code: SELECT currency, as_of_date, rate FROM pbdw.brz_fx_rates WHERE rate > 0
model.cp.int_fx_rates.raw_code: SELECT currency, as_of_date, rate FROM pbdw.brz_fx_rates WHERE rate > 0

model.cp.sei_gld_positions_summary.name: sei_gld_positions_summary
model.cp.sei_gld_positions_summary.compiled_code:
SELECT account_id,
       as_of_date,
       SUM(amount_usd) AS market_value_usd,
       COUNT(*) AS position_count
FROM pbdw.sei_int_positions_enriched
GROUP BY account_id, as_of_date
model.cp.sei_gld_positions_summary.raw_code:
SELECT account_id,
       as_of_date,
       SUM(amount_usd) AS market_value_usd,
       COUNT(*) AS position_count
FROM pbdw.sei_int_positions_enriched
GROUP BY account_id, as_of_date

model.cp.sei_gld_taxlots_summary.name: sei_gld_taxlots_summary
model.cp.sei_gld_taxlots_summary.compiled_code:
SELECT account_id,
       as_of_date,
       SUM(amount_usd) AS cost_basis_usd,
       SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM pbdw.sei_int_taxlots_enriched
GROUP BY account_id, as_of_date
model.cp.sei_gld_taxlots_summary.raw_code:
SELECT account_id,
       as_of_date,
       SUM(amount_usd) AS cost_basis_usd,
       SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM pbdw.sei_int_taxlots_enriched
GROUP BY account_id, as_of_date

model.cp.sei_gld_transactions_summary.name: sei_gld_transactions_summary
model.cp.sei_gld_transactions_summary.compiled_code:
SELECT account_id,
       as_of_date,
       SUM(amount_usd) AS traded_value_usd,
       COUNT(*) AS trade_count
FROM pbdw.sei_int_transactions_enriched
GROUP BY account_id, as_of_date
model.cp.sei_gld_transactions_summary.raw_code:
SELECT account_id,
       as_of_date,
       SUM(amount_usd) AS traded_value_usd,
       COUNT(*) AS trade_count
FROM pbdw.sei_int_transactions_enriched
GROUP BY account_id, as_of_date

model.cp.gld_cash_summary.name: gld_cash_summary
model.cp.gld_cash_summary.compiled_code:
SELECT account_id,
       as_of_date,
       SUM(amount_usd) AS cash_balance_usd,
       COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS account_count
FROM pbdw.int_cash_enriched
GROUP BY account_id, as_of_date
model.cp.gld_cash_summary.raw_code:
SELECT account_id,
       as_of_date,
       SUM(amount_usd) AS cash_balance_usd,
       COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS account_count
FROM pbdw.int_cash_enriched
GROUP BY account_id, as_of_date

model.cp.gld_fees_summary.name: gld_fees_summary
model.cp.gld_fees_summary.compiled_code:
SELECT account_id,
       as_of_date,
       SUM(amount_usd) AS fee_total_usd,
       AVG(amount_usd) AS avg_fee_usd
FROM pbdw.int_fees_enriched
GROUP BY account_id, as_of_date
model.cp.gld_fees_summary.raw_code:
SELECT account_id,
       as_of_date,
       SUM(amount_usd) AS fee_total_usd,
       AVG(amount_usd) AS avg_fee_usd
FROM pbdw.int_fees_enriched
GROUP BY account_id, as_of_date

model.cp.gld_nav_daily.name: gld_nav_daily
model.cp.gld_nav_daily.compiled_code:
SELECT p.account_id,
       p.as_of_date,
       p.market_value_usd,
       c.cash_balance_usd,
       p.market_value_usd + c.cash_balance_usd - f.fee_total_usd AS nav_usd
FROM imdw.sei_gld_positions_summary p
JOIN imdw.gld_cash_summary c ON c.account_id = p.account_id AND c.as_of_date = p.as_of_date
LEFT JOIN imdw.gld_fees_summary f ON f.account_id = p.account_id AND f.as_of_date = p.as_of_date
model.cp.gld_nav_daily.raw_code:
SELECT p.account_id,
       p.as_of_date,
       p.market_value_usd,
       c.cash_balance_usd,
       p.market_value_usd + c.cash_balance_usd - f.fee_total_usd AS nav_usd
FROM imdw.sei_gld_positions_summary p
JOIN imdw.gld_cash_summary c ON c.account_id = p.account_id AND c.as_of_date = p.as_of_date
LEFT JOIN imdw.gld_fees_summary f ON f.account_id = p.account_id AND f.as_of_date = p.as_of_date

model.cp.gld_gl_consolidated.name: gld_gl_consolidated
model.cp.gld_gl_consolidated.compiled_code:
SELECT t.account_id,
       t.as_of_date,
       t.traded_value_usd,
       a.amount_usd AS accrual_usd,
       t.traded_value_usd + NVL(a.amount_usd,0) AS gl_total_usd
FROM imdw.sei_gld_transactions_summary t
LEFT JOIN pbdw.int_accruals_enriched a ON a.account_id = t.account_id
model.cp.gld_gl_consolidated.raw_code:
SELECT t.account_id,
       t.as_of_date,
       t.traded_value_usd,
       a.amount_usd AS accrual_usd,
       t.traded_value_usd + NVL(a.amount_usd,0) AS gl_total_usd
FROM imdw.sei_gld_transactions_summary t
LEFT JOIN pbdw.int_accruals_enriched a ON a.account_id = t.account_id

model.cp.gld_client_reporting.name: gld_client_reporting
model.cp.gld_client_reporting.compiled_code:
SELECT n.account_id,
       n.as_of_date,
       n.nav_usd,
       g.gl_total_usd,
       RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY n.as_of_date ORDER BY n.nav_usd DESC) AS nav_rank
FROM imdw.gld_nav_daily n
LEFT JOIN imdw.gld_gl_consolidated g ON g.account_id = n.account_id AND g.as_of_date = n.as_of_date
model.cp.gld_client_reporting.raw_code:
SELECT n.account_id,
       n.as_of_date,
       n.nav_usd,
       g.gl_total_usd,
       RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY n.as_of_date ORDER BY n.nav_usd DESC) AS nav_rank
FROM imdw.gld_nav_daily n
LEFT JOIN imdw.gld_gl_consolidated g ON g.account_id = n.account_id AND g.as_of_date = n.as_of_date

model.cp.dim_account.name: dim_account
model.cp.dim_account.compiled_code: SELECT account_id, INITCAP(account_name) AS account_name, client_id FROM pbdw.brz_account_dim
model.cp.dim_account.raw_code: SELECT account_id, INITCAP(account_name) AS account_name, client_id FROM pbdw.brz_account_dim

model.cp.dim_client.name: dim_client
model.cp.dim_client.compiled_code: SELECT client_id, TRIM(client_name) AS client_name, domicile FROM pbdw.brz_client_dim
model.cp.dim_client.raw_code: SELECT client_id, TRIM(client_name) AS client_name, domicile FROM pbdw.brz_client_dim

model.cp.recon_positions.name: recon_positions
model.cp.recon_positions.compiled_code:
SELECT b.account_id,
       b.as_of_date,
       COUNT(b.positions_id) AS bronze_count,
       COUNT(s.positions_id) AS silver_count,
       COUNT(b.positions_id) - COUNT(s.positions_id) AS variance
FROM sei_stage.sei_brz_positions b
LEFT JOIN pbdw.sei_stg_positions s ON s.positions_id = b.positions_id
GROUP BY b.account_id, b.as_of_date
model.cp.recon_positions.raw_code:
SELECT b.account_id,
       b.as_of_date,
       COUNT(b.positions_id) AS bronze_count,
       COUNT(s.positions_id) AS silver_count,
       COUNT(b.positions_id) - COUNT(s.positions_id) AS variance
FROM sei_stage.sei_brz_positions b
LEFT JOIN pbdw.sei_stg_positions s ON s.positions_id = b.positions_id
GROUP BY b.account_id, b.as_of_date

model.cp.recon_taxlots.name: recon_taxlots
model.cp.recon_taxlots.compiled_code:
SELECT b.account_id,
       b.as_of_date,
       COUNT(b.taxlots_id) AS bronze_count,
       COUNT(s.taxlots_id) AS silver_count,
       COUNT(b.taxlots_id) - COUNT(s.taxlots_id) AS variance
FROM sei_stage.sei_brz_taxlots b
LEFT JOIN pbdw.sei_stg_taxlots s ON s.taxlots_id = b.taxlots_id
GROUP BY b.account_id, b.as_of_date
model.cp.recon_taxlots.raw_code:
SELECT b.account_id,
       b.as_of_date,
       COUNT(b.taxlots_id) AS bronze_count,
       COUNT(s.taxlots_id) AS silver_count,
       COUNT(b.taxlots_id) - COUNT(s.taxlots_id) AS variance
FROM sei_stage.sei_brz_taxlots b
LEFT JOIN pbdw.sei_stg_taxlots s ON s.taxlots_id = b.taxlots_id
GROUP BY b.account_id, b.as_of_date

model.cp.recon_transactions.name: recon_transactions
model.cp.recon_transactions.compiled_code:
SELECT b.account_id,
       b.as_of_date,
       COUNT(b.transactions_id) AS bronze_count,
       COUNT(s.transactions_id) AS silver_count,
       COUNT(b.transactions_id) - COUNT(s.transactions_id) AS variance
FROM sei_stage.sei_brz_transactions b
LEFT JOIN pbdw.sei_stg_transactions s ON s.transactions_id = b.transactions_id
GROUP BY b.account_id, b.as_of_date
model.cp.recon_transactions.raw_code:
SELECT b.account_id,
       b.as_of_date,
       COUNT(b.transactions_id) AS bronze_count,
       COUNT(s.transactions_id) AS silver_count,
       COUNT(b.transactions_id) - COUNT(s.transactions_id) AS variance
FROM sei_stage.sei_brz_transactions b
LEFT JOIN pbdw.sei_stg_transactions s ON s.transactions_id = b.transactions_id
GROUP BY b.account_id, b.as_of_date

model.cp.dq_positions.name: dq_positions
model.cp.dq_positions.compiled_code:
SELECT account_id,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN amount_usd < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS negative_count
FROM pbdw.sei_int_positions_enriched
GROUP BY account_id
model.cp.dq_positions.raw_code:
SELECT account_id,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN amount_usd < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS negative_count
FROM pbdw.sei_int_positions_enriched
GROUP BY account_id

model.cp.dq_cash.name: dq_cash
model.cp.dq_cash.compiled_code:
SELECT account_id,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN amount_usd < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS negative_count
FROM pbdw.int_cash_enriched
GROUP BY account_id
model.cp.dq_cash.raw_code:
SELECT account_id,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN amount_usd < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS negative_count
FROM pbdw.int_cash_enriched
GROUP BY account_id

model.cp.dq_fees.name: dq_fees
model.cp.dq_fees.compiled_code:
SELECT account_id,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN amount_usd < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS negative_count
FROM pbdw.int_fees_enriched
GROUP BY account_id
model.cp.dq_fees.raw_code:
SELECT account_id,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN amount_usd < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS negative_count
FROM pbdw.int_fees_enriched
GROUP BY account_id

model.cp.dq_nav.name: dq_nav
model.cp.dq_nav.compiled_code: SELECT account_id, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM imdw.gld_nav_daily GROUP BY account_id
model.cp.dq_nav.raw_code: SELECT account_id, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM imdw.gld_nav_daily GROUP BY account_id

model.cp.snap_nav_history.name: snap_nav_history
model.cp.snap_nav_history.compiled_code:
SELECT account_id, as_of_date, nav_usd,
       LAG(nav_usd) OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY as_of_date) AS prev_nav_usd,
       nav_usd - LAG(nav_usd) OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY as_of_date) AS nav_change
FROM imdw.gld_nav_daily
model.cp.snap_nav_history.raw_code:
SELECT account_id, as_of_date, nav_usd,
       LAG(nav_usd) OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY as_of_date) AS prev_nav_usd,
       nav_usd - LAG(nav_usd) OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY as_of_date) AS nav_change
FROM imdw.gld_nav_daily

SELECT account_id, as_of_date, nav_usd,
       LAG(nav_usd) OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY as_of_date) AS prev_nav_usd,

model.cp.fct_positions_by_client.name: fct_positions_by_client
model.cp.fct_positions_by_client.compiled_code:
SELECT c.client_name,
       c.domicile,
       g.as_of_date,
       SUM(g.market_value_usd) AS total_usd
FROM imdw.sei_gld_positions_summary g
JOIN pbdw.dim_account a ON a.account_id = g.account_id
JOIN pbdw.dim_client c ON c.client_id = a.client_id
GROUP BY c.client_name, c.domicile, g.as_of_date
model.cp.fct_positions_by_client.raw_code:
SELECT c.client_name,
       c.domicile,
       g.as_of_date,
       SUM(g.market_value_usd) AS total_usd
FROM imdw.sei_gld_positions_summary g
JOIN pbdw.dim_account a ON a.account_id = g.account_id
JOIN pbdw.dim_client c ON c.client_id = a.client_id
GROUP BY c.client_name, c.domicile, g.as_of_date

model.cp.fct_cash_by_client.name: fct_cash_by_client
model.cp.fct_cash_by_client.compiled_code:
SELECT c.client_name,
       c.domicile,
       g.as_of_date,
       SUM(g.cash_balance_usd) AS total_usd
FROM imdw.gld_cash_summary g
JOIN pbdw.dim_account a ON a.account_id = g.account_id
JOIN pbdw.dim_client c ON c.client_id = a.client_id
GROUP BY c.client_name, c.domicile, g.as_of_date
model.cp.fct_cash_by_client.raw_code:
SELECT c.client_name,
       c.domicile,

JOIN pbdw.dim_account a ON a.account_id = g.account_id
JOIN pbdw.dim_client c ON c.client_id = a.client_id
GROUP BY c.client_name, c.domicile, g.as_of_date

model.cp.stg_interest.name: stg_interest
model.cp.stg_interest.compiled_code:
SELECT interest_id, account_id, as_of_date, ABS(amount) AS amount, UPPER(currency) AS currency

WHERE amount IS NOT NULL

model.cp.int_interest_enriched.name: int_interest_enriched
model.cp.int_interest_enriched.compiled_code:
SELECT s.interest_id, s.account_id, s.as_of_date, s.amount * fx.rate AS amount_usd
FROM pbdw.stg_interest s
LEFT JOIN pbdw.int_fx_rates fx ON fx.currency = s.currency AND fx.as_of_date = s.as_of_date
model.cp.int_interest_enriched.raw_code:

model.cp.gld_income_statement.name: gld_income_statement
model.cp.gld_income_statement.compiled_code:
SELECT i.account_id,
       i.as_of_date,
       i.interest_total_usd,
       d.dividends_total_usd,
       i.interest_total_usd + d.dividends_total_usd AS gross_income_usd
FROM imdw.gld_interest_summary i
LEFT JOIN imdw.sei_gld_dividends_summary d ON d.account_id = i.account_id AND d.as_of_date = i.as_of_date
model.cp.gld_income_statement.raw_code:
SELECT i.account_id,
       i.as_of_date,
       i.interest_total_usd,
       d.dividends_total_usd,
       i.interest_total_usd + d.dividends_total_usd AS gross_income_usd
FROM imdw.gld_interest_summary i
LEFT JOIN imdw.sei_gld_dividends_summary d ON d.account_id = i.account_id AND d.as_of_date = i.as_of_date

model.cp.gld_exec_dashboard.name: gld_exec_dashboard
model.cp.gld_exec_dashboard.compiled_code:
SELECT n.as_of_date,
       SUM(n.nav_usd) AS total_aum_usd,
       SUM(inc.gross_income_usd) AS total_income_usd,
       COUNT(DISTINCT n.account_id) AS account_count
FROM imdw.gld_nav_daily n
LEFT JOIN imdw.gld_income_statement inc ON inc.account_id = n.account_id AND inc.as_of_date = n.as_of_date
GROUP BY n.as_of_date
model.cp.gld_exec_dashboard.raw_code:
SELECT n.as_of_date,
       SUM(n.nav_usd) AS total_aum_usd,
       SUM(inc.gross_income_usd) AS total_income_usd,
       COUNT(DISTINCT n.account_id) AS account_count
FROM imdw.gld_nav_daily n
LEFT JOIN imdw.gld_income_statement inc ON inc.account_id = n.account_id AND inc.as_of_date = n.as_of_date
GROUP BY n.as_of_date
